title: Output Base File Name
text: Output Base File Name Name of the output ( .c ) file, up to 16 characters in length. If your operating system does not support 16-character file names, you must specify a compatible file name. Description If not specified, the default name generated is uo_ ComponentName .c . To generate the output file that contains the stub code for the C component, compile the component from the command line using the /sto switch. The output file includes the specified header files, the C service and operation definitions, and context pointers, if they were specified in the operation definition. Applies To Signature Implementation (C) Related Links /sto Export interface definitions to integrate call-in from various types of middleware, or generate Java files for Java call-in, or generate C call-out stub code.
